reason: Successfully verified that the QA-20260407-191830-5oro agent can execute browser commands and return the correct page title
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the Super Agent application
Found and clicked the "QA-20260407-191830-5oro" agent in the sidebar — Successfully selected the agent and opened its chat interface
Typed and sent the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was successfully sent and agent status changed to "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Response received successfully within ~12 seconds

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" — Screenshot confirms the agent returned the message "The page title is Example Domain. It's a simple placeholder page with a "Learn more" link." which clearly mentions "Example Domain"
